Class
Description
ActionType
Project: TurnBasedCombat242Final Purpose Details: Turn-based cat combat game where Alpha, Explorer, or Yoda fight dog enemies and a three-headed dog boss.

Project: TurnBasedCombat242Final Purpose Details: Turn-based cat combat game where Alpha, Explorer, or Yoda fight dog enemies and a three-headed dog boss.

Project: TurnBasedCombat242Final Purpose Details: Turn-based cat combat game where Alpha, Explorer, or Yoda fight dog enemies and a three-headed dog boss.

Project: TurnBasedCombat242Final Purpose Details: Turn-based cat combat game where Alpha, Explorer, or Yoda fight dog enemies and a three-headed dog boss.

Project: TurnBasedCombat242Final Purpose Details: Turn-based cat combat game where Alpha, Explorer, or Yoda fight dog enemies and a three-headed dog boss.
SoundManager
Project: TurnBasedCombat242Final Purpose Details: Handles background music and sound effects.
TankDog
Project: TurnBasedCombat242Final Purpose Details: Turn-based cat combat game where Alpha, Explorer, or Yoda fight dog enemies and a three-headed dog boss.
ThreeHeadedDogBoss
Project: TurnBasedCombat242Final Purpose Details: Final boss enemy for the turn-based cat combat game.

Project: TurnBasedCombat242Final Purpose Details: Turn-based cat combat game where Alpha, Explorer, or Yoda fight dog enemies and a three-headed dog boss.
